name: zendesk
description: Operation ledger for the official Zendesk Support API surface; executable streams, bounded direct reads, and reverse-ETL writes are mapped by later Zendesk CLI parity sub-issues.

risk.read: bounded direct-read JSON commands are enabled for 282 typed GET operations; ETL streams and binary downloads are still gated by later Zendesk lanes
risk.write: operation-ledger bundle in issue #160; Zendesk mutations remain blocked until typed reverse-ETL schemas, approval text, redaction, and destructive confirmation are added
risk.approval: all external writes remain plan → preview → approval → execute and blocked in this slice
